On this Wall Street Week, David Westin talks about the power of owning one’s mistakes. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/newsletters/2026-02-28/trump-won-t-call-tariffs-a-mistake-but-most-of-us-have-real-regrets?taid=69a2e77d5a823e0001d0ffec&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

Iran’s counter-attacks on Saturday came as a jarring reminder of geography to Dubai and Abu Dhabi, which have transformed themselves into global financial centers built on a bedrock of safety and stability https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-28/iran-strikes-explosions-in-dubai-abu-dhabi-jolt-middle-east-financial-hubs?taid=69a2e5137abc6e0001a5e630&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

A number of oil tankers are avoiding sailing through Hormuz shipping strait, with some shipowners taking a caution-first approach after the US and Israel bombed Iran https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-28/oil-tankers-avoiding-vital-hormuz-strait-after-us-bombs-iran?taid=69a2e49121ffb6000118cb12&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

The latest US strikes on Iran mark a nadir in the strained relationship between the two countries. Here's what to know. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/features/2026-02-28/us-iran-relations-a-visual-timeline-of-their-fraught-ties?taid=69a2dc2d6a41fe0001bdba91&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

Saturday’s joint US strikes with Israel against Iran cement a 180-degree turn from MAGA orthodoxy https://www.bloomberg.com/news/newsletters/2026-02-28/iran-strike-us-and-israel-launch-attacks?taid=69a2d91c7abc6e0001a5e5e5&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

Beijing and Brussels are mostly “hat” with little “cattle” when it comes to the reserve currency debate. For now, anyway. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/newsletters/2026-02-28/europe-and-china-can-only-dream-of-rivaling-dollar-new-economy?taid=69a2d62718c5780001101cb8&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

President Donald Trump is planning to address the nation on Saturday morning in the wake of the US military strike on Iran, according to news reports https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-28/trump-to-give-address-to-nation-saturday-morning-on-iran-strike?taid=69a2d3ac5a823e0001d0ff54&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

The unprecedented US and Israeli attack against Iran on Saturday has already surpassed previous strike-and-retaliation cycles as Tehran treats the conflict as an existential threat https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-28/middle-east-conflict-widens-as-tehran-faces-existential-threat?taid=69a2cda5b050d80001bcf733&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

RT by @ycombinator: We just went from horse-and-carriage to car. The old manuals still have truth in them, but the whole map of effort, speed, and leverage changed overnight. Building used to mean holding an entire system in your head. A fragile memory palace. A house of cards in biological primate…

RT by @ycombinator: Super excited that YC will be hosting a Bio + AI hackathon in March, organized by two awesome companies @BioRender and @tamarindbio. Come to the YC office in SF and hack on the next AI scientist, drug discovery method, or bio data infrastructure. One of the prizes is a guaranteed… pic.

Autostep uncovers repetitive tasks ready for AI. Then builds or finds the agents to solve them. Your team repeats the same work hundreds of times a week. No one notices. Autostep does. Congrats on the launch, @aidan__pratt!  pic.

RT by @ycombinator: Crow (  YC W26) lets users control your app through chat. Connect Crow's AI agent to your product, and Crow takes action for your users instead of them clicking through menus. Crow’s customers go live in under a week - getting an AI Assistant on their app… pic.
Lexius turns existing security cameras into AI security guards that detect theft, prevent liability, and turns months of video into searchable answers. Congrats on the launch, David and Liam!

Verdex is replacing physical inspections in insurance with real-time satellite imagery audits, allowing insurers to verify and settle claims without ever leaving their desks. Congrats on the launch, @jadbousselham and Evan!  pic.

.@ArzuleAI builds AI agents that help B2B SaaS companies identify which partnerships will drive revenue, prioritize them, and track ROI so partnerships become a more automated and predictable growth channel. Congrats on the launch, @NickelReady and @Jeffjinlin!… pic.

End Close builds automatic reconciliation for payments companies, replacing manual ops work with AI agents that automatically investigate and resolve every exception. This team previously reconciled $1,000,000,000,000 at Modern Treasury. Congrats on the launch, @SeanBolton and @DavidNewell95!
Tune in:

.@poetiq_ai is a new startup that recently achieved a major jump on the ARC-AGI benchmark by layering a recursive self-improvement system on top of existing models. In this episode of the @LightconePod, Poetiq's Founder & CEO @itfische joined us to discuss how small teams can… pic.
